title: I earn $80/month doing literally nothing #passiveincome
spoken_script:
# Passive Income Script - 45 Seconds

**HOOK:**
So I've got two apps running on my computer right now, and they're literally making me eighty bucks a month while I sleep. Yeah, while I'm sleeping.

**BODY:**
Here's the deal. EarnApp and Honeygain will pay you actual money just to share your unused internet bandwidth. Companies need residential IP addresses to route their traffic through, so they pay you for it. Installation takes like two minutes. Then you just... forget about it. No tasks. No surveys. No annoying referral programs. Just internet you're already paying for anyway.

Your first payment usually shows up in about three to four weeks.

**CTA:**
I put a free setup guide in the bio if you want to actually try it. Both apps are completely free to download and install.
